mapper.select: SELECT a.*, o.name AS owner_name FROM animal a LEFT JOIN owner o ON a.owner_id = o.id ORDER BY a.id ASC
SELECT a.*, o.name AS owner_name FROM animal a LEFT JOIN owner o ON a.owner_id = o.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
SELECT a.*, o.name AS owner_name FROM animal a LEFT JOIN owner o ON a.owner_id = o.id WHERE a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY a.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO animal (name, species, breed, gender, age, weight, owner_id, symptom, photo, vaccine_date, next_vaccine_date) VALUES (#{name}, #{species}, #{breed}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{weight}, #{ownerId}, #{symptom}, #{photo}, #{vaccineDate}, #{nextVaccineDate})
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, o.name AS owner_name FROM animal a LEFT JOIN owner o ON a.owner_id = o.id ORDER BY a.id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT a.*, o.name AS owner_name FROM animal a LEFT JOIN owner o ON a.owner_id = o.id WHERE a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY a.id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animal WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
